_note: Free-credit tracker state. Neither GCP nor Modal exposes 'credit remaining' as an API, so each provider is tracked as remaining = cap - spent, plus a countdown to the window's expiry. 'spent' is filled by the credit-status CI job (or set manually). Fields marked CONFIRM must be read once from the provider console and pasted in (no API exposes them).

gcp.label: GCP free trial
gcp.notes: No API returns trial-credit-remaining. Automatic spend needs BigQuery billing export enabled; else paste console spend. Expiry always read once from console.

modal.label: Modal monthly free (use-it-or-lose-it)
modal.notes: Does NOT accumulate: unused $ is forfeited at month end. 'remaining' = 30 - this-month spend. Programmatic billing export is Team/Enterprise-only; on Starter rely on `modal billing report` CLI or a manual read.
